text: The ego vehicle is initialized on a straight lane away from intersections.
Selects an intersection and filters for straight-through maneuvers to establish the trajectory for the ego vehicle.
A four-way intersection with dedicated left-turn lanes.
Ego agent drives in a straight road
The ego vehicle is placed on a straight section of the lane with a specific Z-offset to ensure stable initialization
A straight road featuring a parking lane or shoulder occupied by a large vehicle (truck).
A straight road with a parking lane or shoulder on the right side.
A multi-lane approach to a four-way intersection.
Defining the lane segments and verifying the availability of a secondary lane for the ego maneuver
An intersection (3-way or 4-way) with marked crosswalks.
Defining a 4-way intersection and the ego vehicle's straight path through it.
A 3-way intersection (T-junction) where ego drives in and selects conflicting pairs of straight and left-turn maneuvers to create a high-probability collision path.
Four-way intersections to find pairs of right and left turns that merge into the same destination lane, setting the structural path for the collision risk.
Filters the road network for valid intersections and selects a right-turn maneuver to construct the ego vehicle's path.
